<!--
Thanks for contributing to WatchMyBirds!

Before submitting, please confirm the checklist below. Keep the PR small and
focused — one logical change per PR is easier to review and revert.
-->

## Summary

<!-- One or two sentences: what does this change and why? -->

## Linked issues

<!-- e.g. closes #123, relates to #456. Remove the line if not applicable. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that resolves an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds capability)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would require users to adjust)
- [ ] Refactor (no behaviour change)
- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] CI / build / tooling

## How was this tested?

<!--
Describe the tests you ran. At minimum:
- Unit tests you added or updated
- Manual verification steps (which route / flow / device)
-->

## Checklist

- [ ] `pytest` passes locally
- [ ] I followed the conventions in [`docs/UI_STANDARD.md`](../blob/main/docs/UI_STANDARD.md) (if touching UI)
- [ ] I did not commit secrets, credentials, or personal data
- [ ] I updated documentation where necessary
- [ ] The change does not introduce new dependencies without discussion
